key.name: show-hidden
key.description: Whether to show hidden files in the file manager.

key.name: view-mode
key.description: The view mode of the file manager (list, grid, or column).

key.name: sort-method
key.description: The method used to sort files (name, size, type, date).

key.name: show-sidebar
key.description: Whether to show the sidebar in the file manager.

key.name: sort-order
key.description: The order used to sort files (ascending, descending).

key.name: last-folder
key.description: URI of the last folder visited in the file manager or picker.

key.name: icon-size
key.description: Size of icons in grid view (24–128 pixels).
